summary: Backend-only live-readiness audit rerun completed. Local regression probes for Indodax v2 contract/mapping, callback host hardening, nginx renderer, and app lifecycle all passed; public domain behavior is still not synced with repo runtime contract.

critical.issue: Returns HTML frontend page (content-type text/html) instead of repo runtime health JSON, indicating public routing/deploy mismatch.
Public callback behavior does not match repo callback server contract (GET returns custom Express text body; POST returns 200 fail), so live ingress/runtime is unsynced.

integration_issues.flow: Public domain health and callback ingress
integration_issues.issue: Domain appears to route to different runtime than audited repo despite local probes passing.

action_items: Sync live nginx/runtime on kangtrade.top with current repo render output so /healthz proxies to app server JSON.
Ensure public /indodax/callback is served by repo callback server path/host validation contract, not alternate Express gate response.
After deploy sync, re-run safe public smoke checks (GET /healthz, GET+POST /indodax/callback) and read-only Indodax v2 checks.
critical_code_review_comments: env.ts still relies on multiple silent defaults (ports/URLs/paths). For strict live-readiness, key deployment routing vars should fail-fast when missing in production profiles.
executionEngine.ts remains very large (>1500 LOC), increasing regression risk for future P0 infra/contract changes.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data; isolated /tmp DATA_DIR values were used for probe runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Local probes passed with env-isolated runs: private_api_v2_mapping_probe, http_servers_probe, nginx_renderer_probe, app_lifecycle_servers_probe. PUBLIC checks still show unsynced domain behavior: /healthz -> HTML, /indodax/callback GET -> custom 405 body, POST -> 200 fail. Several probe suites in this repo are intentionally MOCKED for exchange/telegram harness coverage.
rca of the issue: RCA: issue is deployment/ingress mismatch, not local module regression. Reproduction: curl https://kangtrade.top/healthz returns static HTML; curl GET https://kangtrade.top/indodax/callback returns non-repo Express text; curl POST callback returns 200 fail. Mitigation: deploy nginx config rendered from scripts/render-nginx-conf.mjs with target env (kangtrade.top, /indodax/callback, ports 3000/3001), route callback path to callback server, then revalidate externally.
